spec_match.rationale: Listens for `beforeinput` and `paste` on a contenteditable, surfaces `inputType` and `dataTransfer.items`, and renders inserted images as thumbnails — the exact spec contract.

interactive.rationale: Live event monitor, simulate-insertion button, thumbnail strip, file-metadata readout. Real listener wired to a real DOM editor.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises event flow, dataTransfer object inspection, and image previews — all delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: Adds a mixed-content simulator with a text/plain fallback, logs transfer types/items, and labels IME/media insertions versus clipboard paste using inputType, isComposing, and transfer metadata.

references.rationale: The see-also link now points at the correct Android IME media insertion ChromeStatus entry: https://chromestatus.com/feature/5484282563919872.

design_system.rationale: Status markers use inline SVG with currentColor, canvas colors come from CSS variables, and local button backgrounds continue to set foreground color.

summary: The media picker demo now has the correct ChromeStatus reference, SVG status markers, a mixed media-plus-text simulator, and explicit source classification for IME/media insertion versus clipboard paste.
